headline: Estée Lauder (EL) Is Up 7.5% After Q3 Earnings Beat, Lowered EPS Outlook And Settlement News – What's Changed
summary: In early May 2026, The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. reported third-quarter fiscal 2026 results showing sales of US$3,712 million and net income of US$89 million, affirmed a quarterly dividend of US$0.35 per share, and lowered full-year reported EPS guidance to US$0.69–US$0.83. Alongside these results, Estée Lauder disclosed a proposed CA$1.52 million class-action data-breach settlement in Canada and highlighted guidance for an unfavorable sales impact and EPS dilution in the fourth quarter,...
